query_normalized: multabench: benchmarking multimodal tabular learning with text and image computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (b) by measuring the dependent variable (performance of deep learning models) on the user's specific domain (tabular data), providing an essential empirical baseline for the "Tabular" component of the user's multimodal benchmark. Additionally, it serves as a foundational methodology reference (criterion d) for the standard MLP backbone often used as a component in multimodal tabular architectures.
